title: Sitodier Lawn Mower Bubble Machine Age 3+ for Kids Toddlers, Push Bubble Maker Bubble Blower for Boys Girls with Light & Music, Bubble Toy Outdoor for Party Birthday Wedding
features: Large Size and Strong Grip not Easy to Tip Over- Compared with other models, it has a large size, a firm grip, is not easy to tip over,so there is no frustration when playing with it. Even younger toddlers can handle it

Simulation of Lawn Mower and Parent-child Interaction- This lawn mower toy with lights and music can provide children with an engaging and fun activity whether it is used indoors or outdoors. It truly simulates the scene of dad mowing the garden and is an excellent parent-child toy. The physical movements required to operate the toy can also provide a fun and healthy way for young children to exercise

Easy to Assemble & Leak-proof Design- Parents will love this newly designed bubbles machine toy, which has a simple yet stable structure. It is quick and easy to assemble. Leak-proof design, no leakage trouble. 3 AA batteries are required (not included)

Bubbles Fun Time- Bubble toys are not only a source of entertainment during the spring and summer, but also allow children to participate in various outdoor activities in a fun and easy way. Children can improve their gross motor skills by chasing bubbles, while also improving their visual tracking ability by watching the bubbles float away

INDOOR & OUTDOOR PLAYING- Children can play with this bubble maker in various activities indoor and outdoor. The great bubble toy is suitable for birthday party, park, beach, garden, backyard, photo taking, and wedding. It is an awesome birthday and holiday gift for kids
description: Product Description The Bubbles Mower is a very meaningful parent-child interactive toy. It simulates dad mowing the garden with a real lawn mower, and the toddlers also enjoy a happy bubbles time. Awesome spring summer season toys for various occasions, suitable for camping, birthday parties, outdoor picnics, outings and other outside activities. Package included: 1. One lawn mower bubble machine 2. Two bottle of bubble solution about 230ml (7.78OZ) 3. One screwdriver 4. One insturction manual Chasing Bubbles Birthday Gift Outside Lawn Mower Bubble Machine

specifications_table.Material Care Instructions: ‎Wipe clean with a damp / dry cloth
